班拿貝朝聖指南


機票
因航會有直航機，飛大概15個鐘，我好似未見過fanfares有做過馬德里既優惠 (復活節買因航機票六千幾直飛馬德里)
中東三寶，計埋轉機至少都要19個鐘，我上次搭emirates來回大概$4xxx，飛大概20個鐘

波飛
經官網買飛最平，比賽前一個定二個星期開始賣飛，不過有分優先次序，club member > madridista > public
班拿貝球場出面亦都有個官方櫃台可以俾你買飛，都係比賽前一個定二個星期開始賣飛，每日都會有飛分批出售
另外官方櫃台出面都有堆人坐係度會係咁問你係咪買飛
如果係官網買唔到，可以去viagogo, stubhub度買，佢地多數可以一早買定黎緊嗰季既飛，不過通常都係炒價 （我上次係用viagogo買，睇主場對西維爾，坐係同球員通道隔一個block最前排大概$3xxx，y絲睇馬德里打吡，坐兩邊上方，近3000元。）
*注意：賽事有可能會改期，提前好多買飛既巴打自己留意

Tour Bernabéu
可以參觀班拿貝球場、皇家馬德里博物館、球員休息室、領隊座位與球員後備席
門票: €25 (手持Madridista: €17)
開放時間：10:00-19:30 (星期一及星期六)、10:30-18:30 (星期日及假期)
*注意：比賽日開放時間會提早結束，有d地方唔會開放，巴打自己留意

Madridista
即場做madridista有優惠，平過上網申請
另外球場入面間Adidas madridista有95折，ultra boost嗰啲鞋都照樣有折

交通
去班拿貝球場好方便，metro直頭有個班拿貝站，班拿貝站係深藍色10號線，車站兩個出口都係一抬頭就見到球場
開波前一個鐘左右就入得場

Real Madrid players go for dinner to celebrate upturn in form


Ahead of their most decisive stage of the season, most of Real Madrid's players went for dinner on Monday night at the famous BiBo restaurant in Madrid, ran by the well-known chef Dani Garcia.

Some players arrived together - Casemiro and Vinicius Junior; the French duo of Raphael Varane and Karim Benzema; and the young group of Fede Valverde, Brahim Diaz, Marcos Llorente and Sergio Reguilon - while some came on foot, like Marcelo, Mariano Diaz and Thibaut Courtois.

The rest drove, so that includes Luka Modric, Jesus Vallejo, Isco, Marco Asensio and Dani Ceballos.

The biggest absentees were Keylor Navas, Gareth Bale and Toni Kroos.

Isco jokes with Luca Zidane: I don't play because I'm bad


Once again, Isco was on the bench for Real Madrid as they faced Espanyol at the RCDE Stadium on Sunday night and he decided to joke about his situation with Luca Zidane.

The midfielder is still not relied on by Santiago Solari and with each day, the distance between the two seems to grow.

"I don't play because I'm bad," Isco was caught saying to Zidane by El Dia Despues' cameras after sneezing on the bench.

On the other hand, both Isco and Gareth Bale joined in with Espanyol's chants.

"The one who doesn't jump is Azulgrana [Barcelona's colours]," they chanted while jumping on the Madrid bench.

Drop Bale over Vinicius and Lucas - AS fan poll

Bale’s return from injury after three weeks on the side-lines has opened the debate on Real Madrid’s attacking line. Should the Welshman start? And if so, which one of the two wide players that have played in his absence should be dropped to the bench?

To gauge the opinion of the Real Madrid fan base, AS conducted an online poll, asking: “Who should drop to the bench with the return of Bale?”

Bale’s return from injury after three weeks on the side-lines has opened the debate on Real Madrid’s attacking line. Should the Welshman start? And if so, which one of the two wide players that have played in his absence should be dropped to the bench?


The overall majority of fans surveyed would prefer to see Bale being dropped ahead of Vinicius and Vazquez. The Welshman received 54.10% of the votes. At quite a distance in second place is Lucas Vazquez, whom 36.98% of voters chose to drop; while Vinicius is considered the most indispensable, receiving just 8.91% of the votes.

【資料庫】莫拉達第4位曾效皇馬的馬體會球員

【now.com體育】馬德里體育會以借用形式從車路士引入西班牙前鋒艾華路莫拉達，令他成為最新一位曾效力皇家馬德里的馬體會球員。

26歲的艾華路莫拉達（Alvaro Morata）加盟馬體會後，將成為第4位來投的前皇家馬德里球員，而另外3位分別是桑法蘭托里斯、阿丹以及菲臘路爾斯。馬體會方面希望莫拉達來到後可重拾信心，成為基沙文的最佳拍檔。

莫拉達出身自馬體會的青訓系統，於青年隊時曾先後效力基達菲和皇馬，其後更打入皇馬一隊。他於2014年由皇馬轉投祖雲達斯，在意大利待了兩年後，2016/17年球季皇馬回購莫拉達，該季莫拉達成為皇馬陣中重要一員，助皇馬贏得西甲及歐聯冠軍。

莫拉達重回皇馬一季，表現獲車路士垂青，並成為車仔新「9號」，可惜效果未如理想，車路士現已引入另一位前皇馬球員希古恩。

圖片來源 : Twitter圖片

Real Madrid target the signing of Luka Jovic


Luka Jovic is the striker Real Madrid have set their sights on as the long term solution to their lack of options at the position. The 21-year-old is playing at Eintracht Frankfurt on loan from Benfica but they have an option to buy him for somehwere between €6 and €12 million, which they plan to use.

The attacker, who was born in Bosnia but has a Serbian passport, has a contract until June of this year. He has scored 18 goals in 25 games with the German club - 13 in the Bundesliga and five in the Europa League - and has been a revelation in the Bundesliga this season.

Madrid will have to hurry though as Barcelona and Bayern Munich are interested in the striker, who is mobile, versatile and can finish well. Real Madrid are looking for a young striker to replace Benzema when necessary.

Memphis Depay flirts again, with desires on move to Real Madrid

It’s not the first occasion that the Dutchman has spoken about his interest in pulling on the shirt of Los Blancos, with a big move desired.

Depay has Madrid move at heart


One of the key players currently at Lyon, as well as a fundamental part of the dramatic resurrection of the Dutch national team, Depay spoke to Helden magazine about his future.

“Lyon is a great club,” he announced proudly, before adding, “but it is not one of the five best teams in Europe.”

More specifically, the 24-year old went on to name the clubs that he considered at the very top of the game.

“I want to go to a great club like Real Madrid, Barcelona, Chelsea, Manchester City, PSG or Bayern,” including an extra name for good measure.

But despite the various footballing giants on his list, there was one that stood out for him. “I always talk about Madrid. It’s a royal club, with a white and gold shirt. But right now I’m focused on Lyon...then we’ll see where I end up.”

馬些路太太掛住C朗一家：好失落

【now.com體育】皇家馬德里後衛馬些路的太太Alves坦言，自從基斯坦奴朗拿度一家離隊，整個生活變得很失落。

皇家馬德里球星馬些路（Marcelo）的太太Clarice Alves，日前接受訪問時透露基斯坦奴朗拿度離隊後，生活變得失落得多。原來，馬些路一家和C朗全家很好感情，「我跟他媽媽很熟稔，Georgina（C朗女友）也很好人，我兒子跟他小兒子很夾得來，所以全家感到有點無所適從，覺得很失落。」

Alves是巴西藝人，2006年陪伴馬些路移居馬德里，當年她才18歲，兩人目前養育兩個兒子，她的最新電影作品將在今年推出。原來她不是足球迷，但每場皇馬主場比賽，她都帶兒子亮相打氣。

她又透露皇馬的WAGs們都很團結。「我跟不少球員女伴都是好朋友，好像莫迪歷的太太Vanjia、基羅拿華斯的太太Andrea。我在這兒已經12年了，跟每一個人都很熟稔。」

沙利：若夏薩特想走就必須要走

【now.com體育】咁爆？車路士領隊沙利語出驚人：「如夏薩特想走，就一定要走。」

距離1月轉會窗關閉所剩下時間不多，當大家以為比利時巨星夏薩特（Eden Hazard）離開車路士的機會不大，領隊沙利周三作客般尼茅夫前夕，突然語出驚人拋出大炸彈。「他已28歲，如果他想離隊，我認為他必須離隊。」意大利人表示。

「當然，我希望結果是相反，希望他能留在藍軍。」沙利同時向夏神大送高帽：「他有潛力成為歐洲最強。」

夏神今季已射入10球，另為球隊貢獻10個助攻，也是球隊首席球星，被問到麾下愛將今季多次擔任「9號半」，藍軍主帥回應道：「我的責任是提升他的實力，把他放在最佳的位置。」

夏神今季已射入10球，另為球隊貢獻10個助攻，也是球隊首席球星，被問到麾下愛將今季多次擔任「9號半」，藍軍主帥回應道：「我的責任是提升他的實力，把他放在最佳的位置。」

蘇拿利反擊哥帥：皇馬係史上最佳

【now.com體育】皇家馬德里教練蘇拿利自信，銀河艦隊是近年最成功的歐洲球隊，跟曼城主帥哥迪奧拿唱反調。

哥迪奧拿早前指祖雲達斯、巴塞隆拿、拜仁慕尼黑是近年歐洲最佳球隊，漠視了歐聯3連霸的皇家馬德里。蘇拿利（Santiago Solari）認為，哥帥是故意不提及母會巴塞宿敵皇馬的名字：「無論如何，皇馬上世紀最佳球隊，甚至是史上最佳球隊，所以肯定是近年最佳球隊。」

皇馬於周四西班牙盃8強次回合（首回合皇馬領先4:2）將作客基羅納，上場傷出的隊長中堅沙治奧拉莫斯，肯定能夠克服傷患披甲，蘇拿利說：「拉莫斯有足夠狀態。他已經康復，而且跟其他隊友一起操練，這是個好消息。」

翼鋒加里夫巴利今季表現平平，最近更不受重用，要跟小將雲尼斯奧斯祖利亞爭位，蘇拿利認為派誰人正選披甲，要視乎該場的對手：「每場比賽都有不同的劇本，我們之後還有很多比賽。」

【資料庫】賓施馬係射手上陣王！

【now.com體育】雖然賓施馬終日被嘲埋門能力差，但原來是今季歐洲5大聯賽所有射手之中的上陣王！

未計本周中比賽，皇家馬德里開季至今在各項賽事的3180分鐘，賓施馬（Karim Benzema）就上陣了2607分鐘，上陣35場，只曾缺席2場西班牙盃次回合，冠絕歐洲5大聯賽的射手。事實上，他早前傷手依然落場撐起前線，單是這份鬥心已令人擊讚。

上陣時間第2多的是馬德里體育會的安祖哥利亞，比賓施馬少101分鐘。至於馬體會前鋒基沙文就以2455分鐘排第3位，利物浦的穆罕默德沙拿排第5位，上陣了2303分鐘，熱刺射手哈利卡尼正在養傷，以2232分鐘排第8位。

上陣多之餘，賓施馬貢獻亦不少，取得15個入球、5次助攻，當中有5個入球來自頭槌，在5大聯賽的射手當中，只有拜仁慕尼黑的羅拔利雲度夫斯基比他多，後者頂入了8球。

蘇拿利讚賓施馬諷球迷唔識貨

【now.com體育】皇家馬德里前鋒賓施馬近期大勇，近3場比賽攻入5球，贏得主帥蘇拿利的讚揚。

皇家馬德里的法國前鋒賓施馬（Karim Benzema）周四在西班牙國王盃4強次回合梅開二度，助球隊以3:1擊敗基羅納，兩回合總計以7:3晉級入4強。主帥蘇拿利（Santiago Solari）賽後大讚賓施馬，並批評那些曾指賓施馬對球隊沒有貢獻的人。

蘇拿利說，「對於那些上周才開始賞識賓施馬的人，我感到很遺憾。但是他們仍然有機會去欣賞他，他正處於很好的狀態，這是真的。」

賓施馬在蘇拿利領軍下的皇馬，經常成為被批評的對象，不過在射手加里夫巴利及馬高阿辛斯奧因傷缺陣期間，他的入球帶領球隊度過艱難的時刻。巴利已經復出，周四之戰亦後備上陣。

圖片來源 : ©AFP

Real Madrid: Mallorca's Ramón and Sintes to join Los Blancos


17-year-old defenders Pablo Ramón and Xavi Sintes are to move to LaLiga giants Real Madrid in the summer for a total of one million euros.

Real Madrid have agreed to sign 17-year-old centre-backs Pablo Ramón and Xavi Sintes from Real Mallorca in a one-million-euro double transfer, with the pair to remain at the Segunda División club until the end of the season.

Both age-group internationals for Spain

Ramón has already made his senior debut for Mallorca, becoming the first player born this century to feature for Los Bermellones when he appeared in a Copa del Rey clash against Real Valladolid in October.

A Spain Under-18 international, Ramón will be part of the Spanish squad at the annual Copa del Atlántico youth tournament in Las Palmas next month.

Sintes, a towering centre-half at six foot three, started out at Menorca-based club Atlético Villacarlos before joining the Mallorca academy at a young age, and has represented Spain at Under-17 level.

Youngsters set to follow in Asensio footsteps

The deal sees Ramón and Sintes follow in the footsteps of winger Marco Asensio, who graduated from the Mallorca youth set-up before being snapped by Madrid in 2014.

Francescoli opens the door for Madrid in Exequiel Palacios deal


"His move to Real Madrid is already in motion but there is no hurry. It'll happen in the future", admitted the current River Plate sporting director on local radio.

With little news emerging on the the potential move of Exequiel Palacios from River Plate to Real Madrid, today, River's sporting director Enzo Francescoli offered the latest state of play surrounding the possible move from El Monumental to the Bernabeu for the 20-year-old. Francescoli was speaking on El Mundo radio in Argentina and stated: "I met with Florentino Pérez and there is a certainty that Palacios will move to Real Madrid but the player, nor Real Madrid and even are under any pressure in forcing a deal through. It's in hand, but it's something for the future", admitted Francescoli.

Waiting game

Palacios has already played 24 games for "Los Millonarios" this season despite just being 20 and has already won the Copa Libertadores and has participated with the Buenos Aires side in the FIFA Club World Cup only for Al-Ain to pull off a shock eliminating the Argentine side on penalty kicks in the semi-final in December 2019. It was in the UAE where Francescoli and Florentino Pérez met and discussed Palacios' future.

Despite the feeling that the move is a mere formality, Inter Milan have emerged as another would-be suitor for the players signature. Sources in Italy report that the Serie A side are preparing a parallel bid for the Argentine reported to amount to 20 million euro. The sources revealed to AS that River Plate, despite the positive words of their sporting director are tiring of waiting for a definitive bid from Real Madrid and are anxious to close the ongoing situation and may react positively if the bid from the nerazzurri does finally materialise.

Keylor Navas faces a decisive month

The Costa Rican goalkeeper’s future is up in the air since Courtois joined Real Madrid and the next few weeks will be crucial for him.

Keylor is fit again and will likely start against Girona in the Copa del Rey, ‘his’ competition. Since Solari took over as coach, the Costa Rican has been relegated to a supporting role behind Courtois, only taking a starting spot in the Copa, meaning every match in the knock-out competition is like a final for him. In total he has a possible four games: tonight's tie against Girona, the two legs of the semi-final and the final at the Benito Villamarín on 25 May.

Navas likely leaving Real Madrid

Keylor Navas’ situation is complicated. Despite having recently renewed his contract with Real Madrid through to 2021, his intention is to leave the club at the end of the season. "Xavi told me they are taught to hate Real Madrid"

Baghdad Bounedjah, team mate of Xavi at Qatari club Al Sadd, has revealed the nature of the conversations he has had with the ex-Barcelona player about Real Madrid.

Baghdad Bounedjah is the 2018 Algerian Player of the Year. He is also a team mate of Xavi Hernández and Gabi Fernández at Qatari club Al Sadd, where he arrived in 2015.


The Algerian striker has played with Xavi for the past three years and with Gabi for last six months, during which time the ex-Barcelona and ex-Atletico players have spoken to their Al Sadd team-mates about the intense rivalries that exist between Real Madrid and their respective former clubs.

The nature of those conversations had remained unknown outside the Al Sadd dressing room until now, with Bounedjah revealing in an interview the feelings of Xavi and Gabi towards Real Madrid.

“Neither of them like Real Madrid,” said the Bounedjah. “Xavi told me that in Cataluña they are taught to hate Real Madrid and grow up with those feelings.”

Bounedjah: world's top scorer in 2018

Both Xavi and Gabi helped their Algerian team mate to earn the title of the world's top goal-scorer in 2018 with 58 goals, significantly more than the likes of Cristiano Ronaldo, Lionel Messi, Mo Salah, to name a few. Thirteen of those goals came in the Asian Champions League, which helped Al Sadd to reach the semi-finals of the competition last year.

After having been linked with moves to Leicester City and Leeds United, Bounedjah finally decided to renew his contract with Al Sadd in December, which will see him remain at the Qatari club until 2024.

巴塞隆拿在西甲將鬥華倫西亞，華維迪（Ernesto Valverde）周五於賽前記者會上，談到西班牙盃遇上皇家馬德里時表示：「這將會是2支同時爭取西甲、歐聯冠軍的偉大球會，一次非常精采的對決。球迷將能夠好好享受，見證哪一支球隊殺入決賽，將會很有趣。」

「皇馬今季於聯賽經歷過一段低谷，但現在已經扭轉頹勢，我們知道這將是一場硬仗。」華維迪帶領的巴塞，在西甲首循環曾大炒皇馬5:1，間接令後者辭退教練盧柏迪古。

周六聯賽對手華倫西亞最近回勇取得2連勝，華維迪認為：「華倫西亞再次於前線交出好表現，令我想起上季的他們。他們現在更有信心，一直把握機會，在聯賽榜爬升。」

高圖爾斯：皇馬應該簽夏薩特多過尼馬

夏薩特和尼馬都被傳是皇家馬德里今夏收購對象，「銀河艦隊」門將泰拔高圖爾斯認為球隊如要二擇其一，就該選夏薩特。

曾在車路士跟比利時同胞夏薩特做過4季隊友的泰拔高圖爾斯表示：「我會選擇夏薩特，我喜歡他，當然管理層有決定權。我不知道會發生甚麼事，那不是我的問題，而是主席和管理層。球隊現時就是這樣，賓斯馬狀態很好，攻入17球，加里夫巴利也漸入佳境，只是要處理傷患。你從比賽中看到我們的質素，可惜有時未能破網。」(Goal.com)

奧迪加特：施丹教波令人失去自信

挪威新星奧迪加特2015年起加盟皇家馬德里，惟一直未獲重用，至今以借將身份於維迪斯效力。雖然星途未如理想，但這名「神童」未有後悔加盟皇馬，更指在施丹指導下獲益良多，而該法國球王的技術更叫他感到無地自容。

奧迪加特目前在荷蘭球隊維迪斯效力，談及在皇馬的日子，他直言難以適應但仍獲益良多：「我與一隊一起訓練，又在預備組上陣，當時施丹就是B隊的教練。我也曾為一隊上陣，當時我要很努力去跟上他們的節奏及水平。能跟施丹學習是榮幸，不過有時這也會打擊你的自信，因為當他教你要怎樣做時，你會發現他的技術真的很了不起。」

奧迪加特又強調自己未有後悔「上艦」，「我有很多球隊可以選擇，但加入皇馬是夢想成真。皇馬是世上最大的球會，對我來說這也是最好的選擇。」（Goal.com）

美斯受傷或無緣鬥皇馬

【now.com體育】美斯在周六巴塞隆拿賽和華倫西亞2:2的比賽梅開二度，但後段疑似觸傷大腿，教練華維迪估計美斯「只是小問題」，但能否在周中國王盃鬥皇家馬德里仍屬未知之數。

美斯（Lionel Messi）在這場比賽梅開二度，但他在70分鐘疑因右大腿受傷，需要在場邊接受治理，雖然他其後再度返回場內，但在比賽餘下時間卻未再作任何衝刺跑，令人擔心這位王牌球星的傷情。

華維迪對美斯的傷情表示樂觀，但亦不敢作任何保證：「我不知實際情況，這可能只是輕微不適，我們會看醫生怎樣說，然後從中檢視，我可想像不是太糟，但不能確認任何事情。」

巴塞隆拿將於周三在西班牙國王盃4強迎擊皇家馬德里，若缺少美斯自然影響甚大。這位阿根廷球王已連續9場比賽取得入球，期間共轟12球，腳風甚順。其實巴塞在未來4星期3鬥皇馬，而到月中尚有歐聯鬥里昂，美斯的傷情深受關注。

高圖爾斯談落「車」：總監「無口齒」

【now.com體育】投皇馬之後泰拔高圖爾斯一直未有談及自己離開車路士的事情，直到近日終於開腔，原來他是懷著不快離隊。

泰拔高圖爾斯（Thibaut Courtois）去季仍是車路士戰將時，一度拒絕現身操練，被外間認為他「逼宮」希望離隊他投，最終以3500萬鎊轉投皇家馬德里。當中故事一直不足為外人道，直到近日高圖爾斯終於開腔談及。

泰拔高圖爾斯稱，原來早在3月時他已經與球會總監格蘭露芙絲卡雅（Marina Granovskaia）細談了自己的未來，而這位有「鐵娘子」之稱的藍戰士總監亦與他達成了共識：「我在3月時告訴格蘭露芙絲卡雅我希望離隊，因為在倫敦的生活與及英超的緊密賽程，令我無法與身在馬德里的子女見面。」

當時格蘭露芙絲卡雅稱球會可以找到他的代替人選，所以答應讓他離開。然而世界盃之後車路士高層竟然「反口」，不讓高圖爾斯回歸家鄉：「當時我的離隊變得越來越不可能，因為頂級門將太貴了。高層們跟我說，承諾未能兌現了，請你繼續努力一會兒。」

最終泰拔高圖爾斯為了子女，決定以不回歸隊伍作出反抗，而車路士亦唯有以7160萬鎊的天價，簽下門將阿列沙巴拿加以作代替。

Solari: "Real Madrid never give up, we will fight for everything"

The Real Madrid manager says he was delighted with Vinicius but did not say if he would start at the Camp Nou on Wednesday night against Barcelona.

Santiago Solari spoke to the press after Real Madrid's victory over Alavés on Sunday night.


How do you see Real Madrid's chances in LaLiga?

"We will fight for everything, always, until the end. Hopefully it will be until the end of the fixture list, which will mean we have gotten to the finals. But today there was the hunger to cut down the point difference."

There are a lot of games this February.

"You play all the time, when you start it's LaLiga and Champions...if you get to this stage, it's means you're playing everything. But these players have a lot of experience. I try to pick the very best every time. The most decisive game is the next one and we will go on like that."

Did this prepare Vinicius to play in the Camp Nou?

"I won't say my line-up. Today he played a great game, he left to an ovation, and is responding very well, when he plays in training. We are delighted with his arrival and his potential, alway with the support of the mature players. They look after him and advise him."

Do you have a chance to come back?

"Madrid never give up, we showed this hunger to reduce the lead at the top, like every week. We always come out to win regardless of statistics."

Do you see Bale on the left or the right?

"It was difficult. Alavés defended very well with a lot of seriousness and they were very professional about it, it demanded a lot from us. We tried to change to see Vinicius on the right and Gareth felt more comfortable."

Is it a problem to have Vinicis and Bale who like to play on the left?

"We have Bale, Vinicius, Mariano, Asensio, Benzema.... there is always a solution."

蘇拿利：人人都愛雲尼斯奧斯

【now.com體育】皇家馬德里小將雲尼斯奧斯祖利亞在周日西甲再取得入球，教練蘇拿利大讚這名前鋒人見人愛。

雲尼斯奧斯祖利亞（Vinicius Junior）近期力壓加里夫巴利成為皇家馬德里正選，今役於80分鐘接應中場馬高阿辛斯奧的傳送射入，為皇馬奠定勝局，最終以3:0大破到訪的艾拉維斯。

蘇拿利賽後表示：「雲尼斯奧斯踢了一場好波，獲得班拿貝的掌聲。當他比賽及操練時，反應十分好，我們很高興看到他加盟後的表現。他一直獲得陣中資深球員的支持及照顧，大家都很愛他。」

至於雲尼斯奧斯也坦言，就盤算為世界上其中一支最大型球會效力，也不會懼怕：「我會盡全力幫助球會，願意出任任何教練指派的位置，右路、左路、中路，將會繼續為皇馬爭取勝利。」

Real Madrid have no plans to loan out Brahim Diaz despite his limited involvement since joining the club from Manchester City, says AS.

The club believe training regularly with the first team is more beneficial than joining a ‘weaker’ side.
